SESSION-PHASE-25.purpose: Phase-25 local session-security audit, rollback plan, and static auth smoke gates.

scope.included: Current auth response audit, user/admin refresh and logout behavior, browser storage inventory, Redis blacklist expectation, and rollback path.
scope.excluded: Cookie-only session migration, deploy/install scripts, live credential testing, and backend endpoint shape changes.

audit.finding-1: Backend auth responses issue access_token and refresh_token in JSON and also set httpOnly Secure SameSite=strict cookies.
audit.finding-2: User frontend keeps the current rollback-compatible localStorage access_token and refresh_token flow.
audit.finding-3: Admin frontend had refresh retry support in api.ts but login did not persist admin_refresh_token before Phase-25 local fix.
audit.finding-4: Admin logout and setToken(null) now remove admin_refresh_token together with admin_token.
audit.finding-5: M-027 token blacklist helpers degrade open when Redis is unavailable, so Redis outage must not break auth verification.

migration-plan.step-1: Introduce a cookie-auth backend dependency that accepts httpOnly access_token cookie when Authorization bearer is absent.
migration-plan.step-2: Allow refresh endpoint to use the httpOnly refresh_token cookie while preserving JSON body refresh_token rollback compatibility.
migration-plan.step-3: Switch user and admin frontends to withCredentials and remove localStorage token persistence behind a short rollback flag.
migration-plan.step-4: Run real login, refresh, logout, 401 retry, Telegram auth, and admin role-gate smoke tests before removing bearer fallback.

rollback.path-1: Keep JSON token response and bearer Authorization support until cookie-only smoke evidence passes on the target environment.
rollback.path-2: Rollback frontend storage by restoring localStorage token writes and existing Authorization interceptors.
rollback.path-3: Rollback backend dependency by keeping bearer-first token resolution and cookie fallback disabled.

local-gates.gate-4: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_security.py -v -k blacklist

operator-required.item-1: Approve cookie-only session migration timing because it changes how browsers authenticate after login.
operator-required.item-2: Provide non-production user and admin credentials for real auth smoke tests, or approve a seeded smoke fixture.
operator-required.item-3: Run HTTPS or production-like domain smoke because Secure cookies do not behave the same on plain local HTTP.
